title: Pure Friction
desc: Visual identity for an independent electronic label out of Hannover. Logo, type system, campaign imagery and social templates. Shot on 35mm Kodak Portra.

title: Club Nacht
desc: Event visual identity for a Berlin underground club series. Full-season poster campaign, photography across 12 nights, and social content strategy.

title: Resonance
desc: Creative direction for a multi-day music and art festival. Brand identity, stage design, wayfinding and all editorial content across print and digital.

title: MODULAR
desc: Short-form campaign series for a modular synthesizer brand. Direction, edit and social strategy. Distributed across platforms, 3M+ impressions.

title: Heilung Tour
desc: Tour photography and content for Heilung European run. 14 dates, full access. Print editorial and social delivery.

title: Drift Zine
desc: Art direction and design for an independent music and culture zine. Issue 01–03 covers, layout system, photography.

title: Vale — EP
desc: Visual direction for the debut EP release of Vale. Cover art, press photography, teaser video and rollout strategy across platforms.

title: Subform
desc: Complete brand identity for an underground electronic event series. Mark, type system, poster templates and digital assets.

title: Nachtstrom
desc: Ongoing content production for Nachtstrom — a Berlin DJ collective. Monthly shoots, short-form video and social strategy.

title: Form Festival
desc: Photography and content for a three-day experimental music festival. 40+ artists, full coverage, editorial delivery within 48 hours.

title: SAEL
desc: Full creative direction for SAEL's debut album campaign. Concept, photography, video direction, and visual identity for a 6-week rollout.
